title: Nuclear Technology and Radiation Safety Mission and Vision
content:
Nuclear Technology and Radiation Safety Mission and Vision

Mission

To carry out educational activities in order to provide qualified manpower and knowledge for our country to benefit from nuclear technology in every field.

Vision

Our primary vision is to raise qualified manpower, to scientifically and practically examine the protection of human and environment from radiation, to contribute to the advancement of our country to a level that produces technology and scientific knowledge in order to ensure our country's progress in the field of nuclear technology and its effective use for the development of the country.
